scripts.build: npm run build:database && npm run build:api && npm run build:dotdev && npm run build:studio && npm run build:labs
scripts.typecheck:infra: npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/infra-model && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/haven && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi-proxmox && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi-cloudflare && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi-kubernetes && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi-tailscale && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/effect-pulumi-hetzner && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.infra.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:database && npm run build:api && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/database && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/observability && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/api && npm run typecheck -w @dsqr-dotdev/react && npm run typecheck -w dotdev && npm run typecheck -w studio && npm run typecheck -w labs && npm run typecheck:infra
scripts.typecheck:tsc: npm run build:database && npm run build:api && npm run typecheck:tsc --workspaces --if-present
